## Checklist

- [ ] Change is focused on a single topic
- [ ] No unrelated refactors or formatting churn
- [ ] `project.yml` changes (if any) are accompanied by a regenerated `.xcodeproj`
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]` for user-visible changes
